initiatives.title: AI at Drexel hub
initiatives.description: Drexel created a central AI site for tools, policies, trainings, events, and best practices for students, faculty, and staff.
initiatives.significance: Shows an R1 institution moving AI into governed practice, research capacity, teaching, or workforce preparation.

initiatives.title: ChatGPT Edu rollout
initiatives.description: Drexel signed an OpenAI enterprise license and began a phased ChatGPT Edu rollout starting with faculty.
initiatives.significance: Shows an R1 institution moving AI into governed practice, research capacity, teaching, or workforce preparation.

investment.description: No public dollar amount found in cited source.

initiatives.title: IT GenAI guidance
initiatives.description: Drexel IT warns sensitive university data must not be shared with unreviewed consumer AI services and ties approved tools to legal safeguards.
initiatives.significance: Shows an R1 institution moving AI into governed practice, research capacity, teaching, or workforce preparation.

initiatives.title: AI trainings and Digital Commons

initiatives.title: Applied AI research news
initiatives.description: Drexel highlights AI work in computer vision, emergency medicine, math-teacher tools, materials science, and chatbot harms.

initiatives.title: Drexel ChatGPT Edu enterprise workspace
initiatives.description: Drexel announced faculty access to ChatGPT Edu as a secure university-licensed generative AI platform and publishes a central AI site for students, faculty and professional staff.
initiatives.significance: Adds source-backed detail to the public AI posture.

investment.description: No public dollar amount disclosed for this initiative.

collaborations.description: No external collaboration identified in the cited source.

initiatives.title: Drexel AI Assessment Scale pedagogy guidance
initiatives.description: Drexel Teaching and Learning highlighted the AI Assessment Scale as a granular way to communicate acceptable generative-AI use in student work, directly addressing assessment redesign.
initiatives.significance: Adds source-backed detail to the public AI posture.

regulatory_context.summary: State and system AI context checked only at high level; institution-level sources carry the profile.

narrative_summary: Drexel University shows an AI posture with five documented initiatives across 4 categories. The evidence emphasizes AI at Drexel hub, ChatGPT Edu rollout, and IT GenAI guidance. Policy maturity is coded as comprehensive based on public guidance, privacy language, governance, or tool controls. The profile also records teaching, research, workforce, equity, or enterprise-tool activity where sources support it. Leadership names, enrollment, GPU counts, and contract values are left null when not found in the cited public sources.

research_quality.compiled_by: codex / collect-institution skill / Worker 1 gap sweep
search_queries: site:drexel.edu Drexel ChatGPT Edu generative AI students faculty staff
site:drexel.edu Drexel generative AI assessment redesign teaching
gaps_acknowledged: Leadership names and enrollment were not populated in this missing-only sweep.
Detailed AI budgets, user counts, and GPU counts were not consistently public.
No controversy record was added without a reliable institution-specific source.
Follow-up search closed platform_usage_or_contracts at the product/scope level with ChatGPT Edu, but no Drexel public user count or contract value was found.
Follow-up search closed assessment_redesign with Drexel Teaching and Learning AI Assessment Scale guidance; compute_capacity and aggregate AI spend remain not publicly quantified.
